name: /cloudair/USER_ID/flights_table
description: DynamoDB bookings table name. Substitute USER_ID before calling put-parameter.

name: /cloudair/USER_ID/assets_bucket
description: S3 bucket used to serve static assets. Created by the Lab 2a CloudFormation stack.

name: /cloudair/USER_ID/region
description: Preferred AWS region for SDK clients. Allows region to be changed without redeploying code.

_comment: SecureString parameter — encrypted at rest with KMS (alias/aws/ssm by default)
name: /cloudair/USER_ID/ext_api_key
description: Third-party partner API key. Stored as SecureString so the value is never visible in SSM console without explicit KMS Decrypt permission. In Lab 3a the value is set to 'cloudair-demo-<epoch>' for demo purposes.
notes: To use a customer-managed KMS key instead of the default aws/ssm key, add: --key-id alias/my-app-key
The --with-decryption flag is required on get-parameter and get-parameters-by-path to receive the plaintext value.
IAM policies must grant kms:Decrypt on the KMS key as well as ssm:GetParameter(s) on the parameter ARN.
